dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: Message delivered successfully. 4/4 agents responded (Narvi, Orion, Elanor, Míriel).

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: Narvi and Orion now use their actual names — improvement from run #7. Elanor still says 'still unnamed' and identifies as 'Frontend Developer'. Míriel still says 'still nameless' and identifies as 'UI Designer'. Both have sender_name set correctly in Fluffle but don't seem aware of their own names. -6 points.

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Avg response time: ~4.9s. Narvi: 4.1s, Orion: 4.1s, Elanor: 5.5s, Míriel: 5.7s. Good spread, fast overall. -2 for slight clustering.

improvements: Narvi and Orion now correctly identify by their assigned names (was an issue in run #7 where 3/4 used role titles). Sent direct name-correction messages to Elanor and Míriel in the group chat.
issues: Elanor and Míriel still don't know their own names — they identify by role title despite having sender_name set correctly in Fluffle. Their system prompts likely need to include their character names explicitly. All 4 agents report idle/standing by — no active tasks assigned.
